{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Rose
|pkmn=Copperajah
|type1=Steel
|img=Bede Copperajah.png
|epnum=Pokémon Sword and Shield
|desc=Bede used this Copperajah he borrowed from [[Rose]] to destroy the mural in [[Stow-on-Side]] in pursuit of [[Wishing Star]]s. It was confiscated after the Chairman disavowed him. It is unknown if this Copperajah is the same Copperajah the Chairman uses in battle.

None of Copperajah's moves are known.}}
